checklist: every visual element in snapshot has a component with bbox
all groups represented as Container/Card with styles
semanticChecklist: group alignment encoded when visually centered
non-fullwidth actions have placement and widthMode
icon+label actions encoded as composed buttons (leadingIcon+text)
variants map to semantic color tokens (no stray hex)

assumptions.note: Dimensions estimated from image aspect ratio; natural image pixel dimensions used as-is.
Étape 1 background. Saturated pink-magenta, estimated from visual inspection.
Étape 3 bis background. Material red 700 approximation.
FINISH card background. Material lime 400 approximation.
All bounding boxes are estimated by visual inspection from the screenshot. Not pixel-measured programmatically.
Arrow icon next to RÉPÉTITIONS in group 2. Appears to indicate decreasing reps over sets.
Large numeric/duration text (00:05, 01:30, 10.0s) assigned typographyRef:value as per schema.

openQuestions: Exact pixel dimensions of the source image (naturalWidth/naturalHeight) should be confirmed.
The trailing icon in group 2's RÉPÉTITIONS header (trending_down vs a custom icon) should be verified against app source.
